creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256533
security/libfido2: fix build after base 74ecdf86d8d2

(In reply to Dennis Clarke from comment #3)
The second hunk:

-               set(FIDO_CFLAGS "${FIDO_CFLAGS} -D__BSD_VISIBLE=1")
+               set(FIDO_CFLAGS "${FIDO_CFLAGS} -D__BSD_VISIBLE=1 -D__POSIX_VISIBLE=202405")

is not needed, since it only appends to FIDO_CFLAGS.

I think this diff should be enough, patching directly from the port Makefile.
